## Key Takeaways

- AutoProxy rated "Perfect" brand fit; Stacker rated "Strong" with scope risk
- AutoProxy should launch first — smallest, sharpest, most brand-aligned wedge product
- Hospitality vertical is a strength, not a limitation — pressure-cooker credibility converts to horizontal currency
- Four new products recommended: Sentinel, Playbook, Cashview, Dealflow
- Go-to-market sequence spans 18 months across four phases
- The portfolio is not six tools but one operating philosophy expressed as software
